approaches_tried.name: Direct Verification
approaches_tried.finding: Formula works to 0.4%, exact exponent is 21.4983

approaches_tried.name: Dimensional Analysis
approaches_tried.finding: Confirms ratio must be function of Z, doesn't explain 21.5

approaches_tried.name: Counting Degrees of Freedom
approaches_tried.finding: 43/2 may relate to fermion counting, but no clear derivation
approaches_tried.note: 45 SM Weyl fermions is close to 43

approaches_tried.name: String Theory Scales
approaches_tried.finding: String moduli could fix hierarchy, but 21.5 not derived

approaches_tried.name: Factor of 2 Analysis
approaches_tried.finding: Factor 2 may come from g_H = cH/2, but not proven

promising_leads.interpretation: 45 SM Weyl fermions minus 2 removed DOF
